verses.text: Tate aw, na pa uh' hong hilhnate ngai un la, thu na teltheihna dingun limtakin ngaihsun un
Bang hang hiam cih leh kong hilh thute thuhoih ahi hi. Kong hilhte khempeuh limtakin ciamteh un
Kei zong tapa khat neihsun ka hi a, naupangno khat ka hih lai-in
ka pa in thu hong hilh a, “Ka thugente ciamteh in la, mangngilh kei in. Kong gen bangin gamta in; tua hi leh na nungta ding hi
Pilna leh thu ngaihsut theihna na neihna ding hahkat in. Kong gen thute mangngilh kei in la, hoihtakin ngaihsun in
Pilna nusia kei in; tua hi leh siatna panin nang hong hu ding hi. Pilna deih in; tua hi leh lungmuang takin na omna dingin hong kem ding hi
Pilna na ngahna ding a thupi masa pen hi a, na neih khempeuh na beilawh zongin na zon' ding ahi hi
Pilna deih in; mi lianin hong bawl ding hi. Limtakin pom in; pahtawina hong ngahsak ding hi
Pilna in pahtawina leh minthan'na nangma tungah hong tungsak ding hi,”hong ci hi
Ka ta aw, ka thugente limtakin zui in. Tua hi leh na khan' sau ding hi
Na pilna ding lampi kong hilhzo a, na gamtatna ding zia kong genzo hi
Hoihtakin gamta lecin nang hong nawngkaisakzo ding bangmah omlo ding a, na tai hangin zong na pukkha kei ding hi
Hong kihilhnate lencip in la, khahsuah kei in. Na nuntakna ding ahih manin limtakin zui in
Migilote tawh kikhawl kei in la, amau' gamtatnate zui kei in
Amau' gamtat bangin gamta peuhmah ke'n! Gitlohna peel in! Paisan in la, na maban sem in
Migilote in a sia khatpeuh a sep mateng uh lum theilo uh a, mi khatpeuh a sukzawh mateng uh ihmu theilo uh hi
Gitloh gamtatna, annek bangin nuamsa uh a, ngongtatna, tui dawn bangin a ngaihsun uh hi
Ahi zongin thuman mite' zuih lampi ahih leh sun dong a taang pha semsem zingsang khuavak tung tawh kibang hi
Migilote' lampi ahih leh zan khuamial bangin mial a, amaute a tuksak, a suihkhakte nangawn mu theilo uh hi
Ka ta aw, ka thugente don in la, ka kammalte ngai in
Na kiang panin paikhiasak kei in la, na lungsimah ciamteh in
Bang hang hiam cih leh tua thu a zuite in nuntakna leh cidamna-in a nei uh hi
Na lungsim ngaihsutnate nuntakna nak hi a, na neihsa a manpha pen bangin na kep ding ahi hi
A manlo thu gen ngei kei in la, zuauthu leh a kiza khial thei ding kammalte zang het kei in
Kisuan'na nei hetloin om liuliau in la, maizumin kuncip kei in
Na khatpeuh na sepna thu theitel in. Tua hi leh na nasep peuhpeuh mavang ding hi
Siatna peelin a manin gamta in la, thuman lampi panin themcik zong pialkha kei in.
